name: Climate Action in Transportation (CAT)
blurb: Public dashboard system for estimating transportation emissions — built on EPA MOVES.

name: VISUALIZER
blurb: Suite of ShinyApp modules that visualize results for any CAT-formatted MOVES data table — line/donut/rank charts

name: policyoptimizer
blurb: Optimization tool to simplify policy scenario selection for transportation emissions.

name: catr
blurb: R package: design custom input databases
live_url: invoke default or custom MOVES runs
tags: and convert output to CAT format.

name: moveslite
blurb: R package for estimating county/state/nation emissions from custom inputs using cached MOVES output — seconds instead of minutes.

name: calculator
blurb: ShinyApp built on moveslite for visualizing and comparing transportation emissions scenarios.

name: moves_anywhere
blurb: Tools to run MOVES outside its native UI — programmatic

name: archr
blurb: R package for tidy systems-architecture enumeration

name: tidyfault
blurb: R package for tidy fault tree analysis.

name: geoshiny-verse
blurb: Helpers for building geospatial ShinyApps quickly.

name: simulate
blurb: Simulation tools for reliability and queueing systems.

name: DSAI
blurb: A large open course on Data Science & AI.

name: Sigma
blurb: Online textbook for System Reliability & Six Sigma in R and Python — ~28 chapters.

name: NetSci
blurb: Course site for Network Science & Applications for Systems Engineering.
